semantic_description: Verifies binary_search over a sorted integer array. The function keeps left and right bounds, checks the middle element, returns an index whose array value equals target when found, and returns -1 only when all array positions are known not equal to target. It reads but does not modify the IntArray::full heap segment, handles n == 0 by skipping the loop, and relies on loop invariants that excluded lower indices contain values less than target while excluded upper indices contain values greater than target.
